case: Example New Case v Supplier Ltd

wasted.quote: pleaded wasted expenditure of GBP 1,800,000 is consistent with the Claimant's accounting records

loss_of_profit.quote: Loss of profit during the peak trading period of November and December 2024: GBP 4,200,000

causation.quote: approximately GBP 1,500,000 of the claimed decline is attributable to these non-Platform factors
supportable basis is GBP 1,300,000, not GBP 4,200,000

clauses.summary: Excludes liability for loss of profit.
clauses.quote: the Supplier shall not be liable to the Customer for any loss of profit

clauses.summary: Caps total liability at charges actually paid.
clauses.quote: liability shall not exceed the total charges actually paid by the Customer

fraud.summary: Fraud/misrepresentation route removes exclusion and cap if proven.
fraud.quote: represented that the Platform would reliably support at least 10,000 concurrent transactions
